mapper.select: select lot_no, process_code, process_name, work_date, worker, completion_count, quantity, device_no, film_roll_no, defect_info, create_time, update_time from ticket_completion_detail where lot_no = #{lotNo} and process_code = #{processCode}
mapper.insert: insert into ticket_completion_detail (lot_no, process_code, process_name, work_date, worker, completion_count, quantity, device_no, film_roll_no, defect_info, create_time) values (#{lotNo}, #{processCode}, #{processName}, #{workDate}, #{worker}, #{completionCount}, #{quantity}, #{deviceNo}, #{filmRollNo}, #{defectInfo}, now()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE process_name = #{processName}, work_date = #{workDate}, worker = #{worker}, completion_count = #{completionCount}, quantity = #{quantity}, device_no = #{deviceNo}, film_roll_no = #{filmRollNo}, defect_info = #{defectInfo}, update_time = now()
